$comment: RegScale API-import payload generated to match oscal_profile_to_regscale.py. Three sections mirror the script's POST bodies: 1) `profile` -> POST /api/profiles; 2) `profileMappings` -> POST /api/profileMapping/batchCreate (replace profileID with the id returned by step 1; controlID is the DoW catalog's RegScale integer controlId, ready to post directly against catalogId=219); 3) `catalogTemplate` -> POST /api/catalog-templates (null if OSCAL profile has no modify.set-parameters).
